description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined, olive-green fuselage and a glass-enclosed cockpit situated near the front. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, each bearing a white star insignia, and the tail features a conventional vertical stabilizer with a similar star marking. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine exhausts are visible along the sides of the front fuselage. The landing gear is in a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The surface appears metallic with a matte finish, and the overall design is reminiscent of World War II-era fighter aircraft. The airplane is detailed with panel lines and subtle weathering, giving it a realistic, operational look.
description: A military-style, olive-green single-propeller airplane with a glass cockpit, mid-mounted straight wings, and taildragger landing gear. White star insignias are visible on the wings and tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, glass cockpit, and symmetrical straight wings with star insignias.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, tail structure, and overall planform of the airplane.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine exhausts, cockpit placement, and tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, no visible winglets, and minimal dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
